Torpedoes.title: Torpedoes
Torpedoes.description: Used with ship weaponry. Can be devastating if fired at other spaceships.

RailGunLargeSlugs.title: Large railgun slug rounds
RailGunLargeSlugs.description: Heavy ammunition that can cause large amounts of damage to long range targets.

SmallCalibreRounds.title: Small calibre rounds
SmallCalibreRounds.description: Small rounds made from carbon in order to protect from accidental breaches.
